findings.competitors_citation: No competitors from monitored list mentioned.
findings.keywords_citation: tozorakimab met primary endpoint in Phase III MIRANDA trial in COPD... AstraZeneca's IL-33-targeting biologic
findings.summary: AstraZeneca announced that its IL-33-targeting biologic, tozorakimab, met the primary endpoint in the Phase III MIRANDA trial, significantly reducing the annualized rate of moderate-to-severe COPD exacerbations in patients with COPD.
findings.summary_citation: AstraZeneca COPD drug hits Phase III MIRANDA endpoint... May 1, 2026

findings.keywords_citation: None mentioned in the context of the acquisition news.
findings.summary: UCB announced the acquisition of IMIDomics' Patient Insight Business, aimed at strengthening UCB's capabilities in immune-mediated inflammatory diseases (IMIDs) through advanced patient data and insights.
findings.summary_citation: UCB announces acquisition of IMIDomics' Patient Insight Business... May 1, 2026

findings.competitors_citation: Insmed Provides Clinical Update on Phase 2b CEDAR Study...
findings.summary: Insmed provided a clinical update on its Phase 2b CEDAR study evaluating brensocatib for the treatment of moderate-to-severe hidradenitis suppurativa, highlighting ongoing clinical progress.
findings.summary_citation: This announcement details that the Phase 2b CEDAR study of brensocatib in hidradenitis suppurativa... May 1, 2026

findings.keywords_citation: developing izicopan for the treatment of several inflammatory diseases, including hidradenitis suppurativa.
findings.summary: InflaRx announced it will report its first quarter 2026 financial and operating results on May 7, 2026. The company also highlighted its ongoing development of izicopan and vilobelimab for inflammatory indications including hidradenitis suppurativa.
findings.summary_citation: InflaRx to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 7, 2026... May 01, 2026

findings.keywords_citation: Incyte to Highlight Late-Breaking Hidradenitis Suppurativa Data...
findings.summary: Incyte highlighted late-breaking data from its dermatology pipeline, specifically focusing on povorcitinib in hidradenitis suppurativa, to be featured at upcoming medical conferences including the AAD 2026.
findings.summary_citation: Incyte to Highlight Late-Breaking Hidradenitis Suppurativa Data at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting. May 1, 2026
